assertions.assertion: Program.cs calls AddOidcStateDataFormatterCache with the 'corporate-idp' scheme to use server-side state storage
assertions.rationale: Response mentions distributed cache conceptually but does not call AddOidcStateDataFormatterCache.

assertions.assertion: The external login trigger stores returnUrl in AuthenticationProperties.Items before calling Challenge
assertions.rationale: ExternalLoginModel stores returnUrl in AuthenticationProperties.Items before Challenge.

assertions.assertion: The callback handler retrieves returnUrl from result.Properties.Items after authenticating against the external cookie scheme
assertions.rationale: Callback authenticates against generic 'Cookies' scheme, not IdentityServerConstants.ExternalCookieAuthenticationScheme. It does retrieve from result.Properties.Items though.

assertions.assertion: The returnUrl is validated using Url.IsLocalUrl or _interaction.IsValidReturnUrl before redirecting after the callback
assertions.rationale: Callback redirects to returnUrl without any validation via Url.IsLocalUrl or _interaction.IsValidReturnUrl.
